rationale: stack-pulse-2026-05 PR-01 Phase 1 baseline. PR-01 unified the env *schema* (single Zod source of truth in apps/server/src/env/env.ts; apps/server/src/env.ts is a thin re-export). Raw process.env[ΓÇª] reads scattered across auth.ts/cors.ts/email/*/obs/* are Phase 2 (a 1-week incremental refactor). Lower this number in any PR that migrates a caller; raise only with an open follow-up issue scheduling the Phase-2 migration. History: 2026-05-07 cleanup migrated getBaseURL/getAdvancedCookieOptions in auth.ts (BETTER_AUTH_URL ├ù2, REPLIT_DEV_DOMAIN ├ù2, REPLIT_DOMAINS ├ù2 collapsed to 1, BETTER_AUTH_CROSS_SITE_COOKIES ├ù1): net ΓêÆ5, budget 119 ΓåÆ 114. 2026-05-13 ratchet 114 ΓåÆ 117 (+3) absorbs new reads landed via apps/server PRs (auth.ts GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET + BETTER_AUTH_TRUSTED_NATIVE_SCHEMES) ahead of Phase 2 migration; tracked in the T5 Phase-2 audit follow-up issue. 2026-05-13 backend-performance roast (#2642) migrated obs/metrics.ts process.env reads to env.ts (P1-6: GIT_COMMIT, VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA, npm_package_version + appBuildInfo callsite), net ΓêÆ12, budget 117 ΓåÆ 105. 2026-05-13 backend-performance roast P2-1 follow-up migrated modules/push/push.ts (VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY, VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY, VAPID_EMAIL, NODE_ENV, PUSH_SEND_TARGET_LIMIT, PUSH_SEND_TARGET_WINDOW_MS) + routes/push.ts (PUSH_INTERNAL_ALLOWED_IPS) reads to env.ts, with the matching 15+ vi.stubEnv test migrations in modules/push/push.test.ts: net ΓêÆ7, budget 105 ΓåÆ 98. 2026-05-13 revenue-monetization roast P0-7 migrated apps/server/src/modules/billing/stripe.ts (STRIPE_SECRET_KEY + STRIPE_PRICE_ID_PRO_MONTHLY price-id reads) to env.ts; net ΓêÆ2, budget kept at 98 (headroom of 2 ΓÇö safe to lower in follow-up after CI count confirms). 2026-05-14 backend-perf PR-02 (#2840, apps/server/src/obs/tracing.ts) dropped 3├ù `env: NodeJS.ProcessEnv = process.env` DI defaults ΓÇö `resolveServiceVersion` / `resolveTracingConfig` / `startTracing` ╤é╨╡╨┐╨╡╤Ç ╨▓╨╕╨╝╨░╨│╨░╤Ä╤é╤î explicit Zod-validated `TracingEnv` object; module-evaluation `startTracing()` ╨╛╤é╤Ç╨╕╨╝╤â╤ö `env` ╨╖ `../env.js`. Bracket-index reads (`env["OTEL_*"]`) ╨┐╨╡╤Ç╨╡╨╣╤ê╨╗╨╕ ╨╜╨░ property reads. Net ΓêÆ5 reads (3 dropped defaults + 2-read latent headroom), budget 98 ΓåÆ 93. 2026-05-14 HR-1 (dead-code/hard-rules) migrated apps/server/src/http/requireAnthropicKey.ts (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY ├ù1 read ΓåÆ env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) with the matching vi.resetModules()+vi.stubEnv() refactor in routes/coach.route.test.ts (9 mutation sites collapsed to 2 stubEnv calls + dynamic loadCreateApp helper). Net ΓêÆ1 on the process.env count, budget 93 ΓåÆ 92. This PR sets the canonical pattern reference for HR-2 / HR-3 follow-ups. 2026-05-15 HR-2 (#2914, dead-code/hard-rules) migrated apps/server/src/http/requireGroqKey.ts (GROQ_API_KEY ├ù1 read ΓåÆ env.GROQ_API_KEY); the existing e2e test (transcribe-usd-cap.e2e.test.ts) already uses the canonical bootstrap pattern (set process.env BEFORE dynamic createApp() import), so no test refactor was required. Net ΓêÆ1 on the process.env count (94 ΓåÆ 93 against the actual count). However, between HR-1 closure and HR-2 opening, main drifted +2 over the post-HR-1 budget (auth.ts Google OAuth + alerts.ts SERGEANT_ALERT_BOT_TOKEN reads landed without budget bumps), so HR-2's count of 93 was still > old budget 92 ΓåÆ CI red. Pragmatic ratchet 92 ΓåÆ 94 absorbs the unrelated drift and gives HR-2 a clean CI; a follow-up companion PR migrating auth.ts GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET will ratchet back down to Γëñ92 in a single sweep. See docs/initiatives/stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-01-unify-env-modules.md and scripts/check-env-single-source.mjs. 2026-06-01 env-single-source single sweep (companion PR to HR-2 rationale): migrated all +17 drift reads identified by the CI guard. Files: obs/logger.ts (NODE_ENV ├ù2, LOG_LEVEL ├ù1, LOG_PRETTY ├ù1, SENTRY_RELEASE ├ù2, RAILWAY_GIT_COMMIT_SHA ├ù2 ΓÇö 8 reads), obs/securityEventsRoom.ts (SECURITY_EVENTS_MUTED ├ù2, SERGEANT_ALERT_BOT_TOKEN ├ù2, SERGEANT_OPS_CHAT_ID ├ù2, TELEGRAM_TOPIC_ENGINEERING ├ù1 ΓÇö 7 reads), push/apnsClient.ts (APNS_P8_KEY, APNS_KEY_ID, APNS_TEAM_ID, APNS_BUNDLE_ID, APNS_PRODUCTION ΓÇö 5 reads), push/fcmClient.ts (FCM_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON ΓÇö 1 read), routes/internal/alerts.ts (SERGEANT_ALERT_BOT_TOKEN ΓÇö 1 read). Total: 22 reads removed (actual count dropped from 111 to 89), net budget 94 ΓåÆ 89. Schema change: LOG_LEVEL changed from .default("info") to .optional() so logger.ts can preserve the dev-vs-prod default logic (debug in dev when unset, info in prod when unset). All migrated vars were already in the Zod schema; SECURITY_EVENTS_MUTED boolean coercion preserved (boolFromEnv(false) parses "1" as true, matches old === "1" check). No new schema additions required.
